meta.title: Best Space Gifts for Space Nerds!
meta.description:
My favorite space gifts! 

I’ve also put this all as an article on my website too for easy sharing!!! - https://everydayastronaut.com/best-space-gifts-for-space-nerds/

LEGO Saturn V - https://amzn.to/2S9GEYW

Buzz Space Model Rockets - https://www.buzzspacemodels.com/

Celestron 50mm Brass Telescope - https://bit.ly/2PKxyoN

Universe Today’s Ultimate Guide to Viewing the Cosmos - https://amzn.to/2TDpAM6

Ada Lace book series by Emily Calindrelli - https://amzn.to/2Kpefes

“Elon Musk” by Ashlee Vance - https://amzn.to/2FzFCE3

Grid Fin Not-A-Coasters - https://shop.everydayastronaut.com/products/coaster-set

Everyday Astronaut Webstore - http://everydayastronaut.com/shop

Other great rocket photographers print stores:
Trevor Mahlmann - https://www.tmahlmann.com/photos/
Brady Kenniston - https://www.bradykennistonphotography.com/
Ryan Chylinksi - https://www.cosmicperspective.com/
John Kraus - https://www.johnkrausphotos.com/

And consider supporting any of these photographers by becoming a Patron via http://patreon.com/

Night Sky Star Map - https://thenightsky.com/

NASA Travel Posters - https://amzn.to/2S8p4o6

MOVA Globes (15% off with coupon code “ everydayastronaut “) - http://bit.ly/EverydayAstroGlobes

Mini Moon Lamp - https://shop.everydayastronaut.com/products/3d-printed-moon-light

Vans NASA shoes - https://amzn.to/2zqeYrD , https://www.vans.com/shop/space-voyager

“Maximum Aerodynamic Pressure” by Everyday Astronaut - http://everydayastronaut.com/music

Other great space shops :
SpaceX - https://shop.spacex.com/
Rocket lab - https://shop.rocketlabusa.com/
